title: Trump shooting: lawmaker blasts FBI, which calls probe 'painstaking'
shortDescription: Rep. Clay Higgins blasted the FBI investigation of the assassination attempt on Donald Trump, including the cremation of the shooter's body.

title: New laws restrict voter access in swing states | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Will this make it harder for Americans who are legally allowed to vote to cast their ballots in November? Here's how these moves will impact voters.

title: Trump and Harris begin debate prep
shortDescription: Trump and Harris are scheduled to debate Sept. 10 in Philadelphia

title: Voters ahead of the Democratic National Convention
shortDescription: The Democratic National Convention will gather delegates and politicians from around the country in support of the Harris-Walz ticket.

title: Trump taps transition team led by ex-Cabinet member, Vance and sons
shortDescription: Federal law requires major presidential candidates to name transition teams before the election to give people time to prepare a new administration.

title: Welcome to Your Vote, our elections text group
shortDescription: Cut through the noise of election season by texting with us directly. Ask questions and get breaking political news right in your messages.

title: Hackers from Iran and Russia compete to sink, boost Donald Trump
shortDescription: Iran has emerged as the first hostile nation to hack a presidential candidate whose campaign is being boosted by another US adversary, experts say

title: Fly lands on Trump during press event, echoing viral Pence moment
shortDescription: Social media was abuzz after the fly landed on Donald Trump's face Thursday, comparing it to a viral moment in the 2020 vice presidential debate.

title: Trump says he's 'entitled' to attack Harris: 3 takeaways from NJ press conference
shortDescription: "I think I'm entitled to personal attacks," Trump said during a news conference at his Bedminster, New Jersey, golf club that was slated to focus on the cost of living.

title: Trump on Dems Green New Deal
shortDescription: Donald Trump said he is "angry" at Kamala Harris over Biden administration policies ranging from inflation to immigration and the Green New Deal.

title: Biden: Medicare negotiated discounts on 10 prescribed drugs
shortDescription: President Joe Biden announced that Medicare negotiated discounts for 10 drugs prescribed to treat blood clots, cancer, heart disease and diabetes.

title: Isaac Hayes' family latest to threaten Trump over improper song usage
shortDescription: Donald Trump yet again faces a legal threat over unauthorized music usage, this time to the tune of $3 million from family of musician Isaac Hayes

title: Poll: Supreme Court bigger election motivator for Democrats
shortDescription: Voters say the presidential race will impact the future of the Supreme Court, USA TODAY, poll finds.

title: Harris, Trump trying to nix taxes on tips
shortDescription: Kamala Harris called for lifting the tax on tips and raising the federal minimum wage shortly after Donald Trump, who accused her of copying his idea.

title: 'Trump train' message edited onto photo of truck crash | Fact check
shortDescription: The text on the truck has been edited. The original photo shows the phrase "On the road to success, there are no shortcuts" on the truck.

title: Donald Trump adds Corey Lewandowski, other longtime allies to 2024 campaign
shortDescription: Corey Lewandowski, Trump's first campaign manager during the 2016 presidential cycle, is among those coming aboard.
